title: Save conditional formatting
excerpt:
Currently you can only save it as a new view, but not on the main view. 
Please make it so that the conditional formatting can be saved for the default view.

posts.author: Magasul (Olivér Varga)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently you can only save it as a new view, but not on the main view.
Please make it so that the conditional formatting can be saved for the default view.
